text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Create all feature screens (Stage 4b)","description":"Create all feature screen files for saju-flutter, porting from iOS Swift views:

1. `lib/features/auth/login_screen.dart` — LoginScreen: hero section (🔮 icon, title, feature rows), ChatGPT login button, "둘러보기" button. Port from LoginView.swift.

2. `lib/features/onboarding/onboarding_screen.dart` — OnboardingScreen: form with name, gender toggle, calendar type, birth date pickers (CupertinoPicker style), optional birth hour, relationship status chips, submit button. Port from OnboardingView.swift.

3. `lib/features/main_tab/main_tab_screen.dart` — MainTabScreen: BottomNavigationBar with 5 tabs (홈, 사주, 궁합, 운세, 프로필). Uses GoRouter's StatefulShellRoute. Port from MainTabView.swift.

4. `lib/features/home/home_screen.dart` — HomeScreen: greeting header, fortune summary card (scores, lucky info), quick actions. Port from HomeView.swift.

5. `lib/features/saju/saju_input_screen.dart` — SajuInputScreen: form cards for date, calendar type, time, gender. "내 정보 불러오기" button. Navigate to result. Port from SajuInputView.swift.

6. `lib/features/saju/saju_result_screen.dart` — SajuResultScreen: loading → HeroBanner + FourPillarsCard + FiveElementsChart + 5 ChapterCards (streaming) + ClosingCard. Port from SajuResultView.swift.

7. `lib/features/gunghap/gunghap_input_screen.dart` — GunghapInputScreen: 2 PersonFormCards with heart divider, analyze button. Port from GunghapInputView.swift.

8. `lib/features/gunghap/gunghap_result_screen.dart` — GunghapResultScreen: name pair header, compatibility ring, category scores, element harmony, AI interpretation streaming. Port from GunghapResultView.swift.

9. `lib/features/fortune/daily_fortune_screen.dart` — DailyFortuneScreen: date header, day pillar card, score bars, lucky info, AI interpretation streaming. Port from DailyFortuneView.swift.

10. `lib/features/profile/profile_screen.dart` — ProfileScreen: avatar, basic info card, account card, app settings, danger zone. Port from ProfileView.swift.

All iOS view source files are in /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/Features/. Read them for exact UI structure and styling. Use AppColors from theme.dart for all colors. Use Riverpod ref.watch/ref.read for state.","assignedBy":"stage4-screens","timestamp":"2026-03-03T07:58:31.469Z"}
